parameters.content:
=**Cache Health Alert**

{{ $json.api_error ? 'Gemini API Error — could not retrieve cache list
' : '' }}{{ $json.missing_caches.length > 0 ? 'Missing Caches:
' + $json.missing_caches.map(c => '- ' + c).join('
') + '
' : '' }}{{ $json.soon_expiring.length > 0 ? 'Expiring Soon:
' + $json.soon_expiring.map(c => '- ' + c.name + ' (' + c.minutes_remaining + ' min remaining)').join('
') + '
' : '' }}
Total Active Caches: {{ $json.total_caches }}
Checked At: {{ $json.checked_at }}

Auto-rebuild initiated for missing caches.

parameters.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Rebuild missing Gemini caches
cd /root/ai-agent-pipeline

MISSING='{{ $json.missing_caches.join(",") }}'
LOG_FILE="/var/log/cache-rebuild-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log"

echo "Cache rebuild started at $(date)" > "$LOG_FILE"

if echo "$MISSING" | grep -q 'project-kb'; then
  echo "Rebuilding project-kb cache..." >> "$LOG_FILE"
  # Concatenate key knowledge base files
  cat ARCHITECTURE.md STRATEGY.md GTG1002_ANALYSIS.md > /tmp/project-kb-content.md 2>> "$LOG_FILE"
  # Use Gemini API to create cache (replace with actual cache creation script)
  if [ -f scripts/rebuild-cache.sh ]; then
    bash scripts/rebuild-cache.sh project-kb /tmp/project-kb-content.md >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
  else
    echo "WARN: scripts/rebuild-cache.sh not found — manual rebuild required" >> "$LOG_FILE"
  fi
fi

if echo "$MISSING" | grep -q 'project-deliverables'; then
  echo "Rebuilding project-deliverables cache..." >> "$LOG_FILE"
  # Concatenate all reports and deliverables
  find reports/ -name '*.md' -exec cat {} + > /tmp/project-deliverables-content.md 2>> "$LOG_FILE"
  if [ -f scripts/rebuild-cache.sh ]; then
    bash scripts/rebuild-cache.sh project-deliverables /tmp/project-deliverables-content.md >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
  else
    echo "WARN: scripts/rebuild-cache.sh not found — manual rebuild required" >> "$LOG_FILE"
  fi
fi

# Also refresh any soon-to-expire caches
SOON_EXPIRING='{{ $json.soon_expiring.map(c => c.name).join(",") }}'
if [ -n "$SOON_EXPIRING" ] && [ "$SOON_EXPIRING" != "" ]; then
  echo "Refreshing soon-expiring caches: $SOON_EXPIRING" >> "$LOG_FILE"
  if [ -f scripts/refresh-cache.sh ]; then
    bash scripts/refresh-cache.sh "$SOON_EXPIRING" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
  fi
fi

echo "Cache rebuild completed at $(date)" >> "$LOG_FILE"
cat "$LOG_FILE"
